title: hippeastrum × carnarvonium
intro: Hippeastrum × carnarvonium is a hybrid plant species within the Amaryllidaceae family, derived from the cross between Hippeastrum johnstonii and Hippeastrum regale. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. Its health benefits include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its rich content of alkaloids like galantamine and lycorine. In herbal preparations, Hippeastrum × carnarvonium is often used to create tinctures, infusions, and salves, which are believed to provide relief from pain and promote overall well-being.
